expected_path_note: business_share=Y -> SC1=N (no board seat, no role) -> SC2=Y (has stake) -> SC3=N (15%) -> DE1-3 -> DE4 Q1 income=N (5%) -> DE4 Q2 wealth=Y (40% of net worth) -> siap (isolates the wealth prong of the DE triad)
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 27 – Minority Stake Whose Value Dominates Personal Wealth
activities: Valentina Rojas holds a 15% equity stake, acquired as a private-equity co-investment, in a contractor building government administrative complexes for the national government of Turkmenistan; almost all of the company's revenue comes from these contracts. She has no board seat, no management role and does not work for the company. The stake pays only modest dividends, representing about 5% of her annual income, but its current valuation makes up roughly 40% of her total net worth, since most of her other assets were distributed to her children last year.
origin_of_assets: Private-equity co-investment; dividends and salary from an unrelated consulting role.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Other non-liquid assets consist almost entirely of the valuation of her 15% stake.
